# zstack_ipsec_connection (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage IPsec connections in ZStack. An IPsec connection provides secure site-to-site VPN connectivity.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth_key` (String, Sensitive) The authentication key for the IPsec connection.
- `name` (String) The name of the IPsec connection.
- `peer_address` (String) The peer address for the IPsec connection.
- `vip_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VIP.

### Optional

- `auth_mode` (String) The authentication mode for the IPsec connection.
- `description` (String) A description for the IPsec connection.
- `ike_auth_algorithm` (String) The IKE authentication algorithm.
- `ike_encryption_algorithm` (String) The IKE encryption algorithm.
- `pfs` (String) The Perfect Forward Secrecy setting.
- `policy_auth_algorithm` (String) The policy authentication algorithm.
- `policy_encryption_algorithm` (String) The policy encryption algorithm.
- `policy_mode` (String) The policy mode for the IPsec connection.
- `transform_protocol` (String) The transform protocol for the IPsec connection.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the IPsec connection.
- `status` (String) The status of the IPsec connection.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the IPsec connection.
